message:
fix: wire isDemoFallback in all kagenti cards for proper Demo badge (#3186)

* fix: remove cluster locations card from My Clusters dashboard

The cluster locations card is not useful in its current state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: wire isDemoFallback in all kagenti cards for proper Demo badge

All 7 kagenti cards were using the global isDemoMode flag instead of
isDemoFallback from their data hooks. This meant when kagenti wasn't
installed and demo fallback data was shown, the cards displayed fake
data without the Demo badge — making it look like real data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,18 +3,16 @@ import { Shield, ShieldCheck, ShieldAlert, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react'
 import { useKagentiCards, type KagentiCard } from '../../../hooks/mcp/kagenti'
 import { useCardLoadingState } from '../CardDataContext'
 import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
-import { useDemoMode } from '../../../hooks/useDemoMode'
 
 export function KagentiSecurity({ config }: { config?: Record<string, unknown> }) {
   const { t: _t } = useTranslation()
-  const { isDemoMode } = useDemoMode()
   const cluster = config?.cluster as string | undefined
-  const { data: cards, isLoading } = useKagentiCards({ cluster })
+  const { data: cards, isLoading, isDemoFallback } = useKagentiCards({ cluster })
 
   useCardLoadingState({
     isLoading,
     hasAnyData: cards.length > 0,
-    isDemoData: isDemoMode,
+    isDemoData: isDemoFallback,
   })
 
   const stats = useMemo(() => {
